HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.title: Fans
HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] unless you are [gold]Singing[/gold]. Idol forms consume 1 additional [gold]Fan[/gold] each turn.
HOLOGIRL-FANS_POWER.smartDescription: Lose 1 at end of turn unless [gold]Singing[/gold].
HOLOGIRL-SINGING_POWER.title: Singing
HOLOGIRL-SINGING_POWER.description: [gold]Fans[/gold] do not decay at end of turn. Decreases by 1 at the start of your turn.
HOLOGIRL-SHAPESHIFT_POWER.title: Shapeshift
HOLOGIRL-SHAPESHIFT_POWER.description: Hologirl's core ability. Enter an [gold]Idol Form[/gold]. Idol Forms spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] at the end of your turn to stay active; if you cannot pay, return to base Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-SHAPESHIFT_POWER.smartDescripti: Enter an [gold]Idol Form[/gold]. Spend [gold]Fans[/gold] to maintain it.
HOLOGIRL-FAUNA_FORM_POWER.title: Fauna Form
HOLOGIRL-FAUNA_FORM_POWER.description: A gentle nature idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-AMELIA_FORM_POWER.title: Amelia Form
HOLOGIRL-AMELIA_FORM_POWER.description: A clever detective idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-GURA_FORM_POWER.title: Gura Form
HOLOGIRL-GURA_FORM_POWER.description: A sharp shark idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
HOLOGIRL-KRONII_FORM_POWER.title: Kronii Form
HOLOGIRL-KRONII_FORM_POWER.description: A poised timekeeper idol form. At the end of your turn, spend 1 [gold]Fan[/gold] or return to Hologirl.
